title: High Court Registrar General can't initiate disciplinary inquiry against judicial officers: Supreme Court
description: The Supreme Court on Monday ruled that the initiation of disciplinary proceedings against a judicial officer would be rendered constitutionally invalid if they are not authorised by the Chief Justice of the High Court or a committee constituted by him [Uttarakhand High Court v. Deepali Sharma].A Bench of Chief Justice of India (CJI) Surya Kant and Justice Joymalya Bagchi made the observation while upholding the Uttarakhand High Court's decision to reinstate a civil judge who was earlier dismisse
